Balance guides us all. Train all 24 skills, including Sailing, as a team to certain thresholds to receive points for this tile.
For example; if your team earns 100k in all 24 skills (tracked via WOM) you will receive 1 point. For every additional 100k base xp earned in all skills, you will receive an aditional point, with up to 20 possible points to be earned with this tile (base XP capped at 2m as a team).
If that made sense, great. If it didn't heres another example; Team 1 earns exactly 100k in all 24 skills, at the end of bingo they earn 1 point. Team 2 earns 700k in all skills, at the end of bingo they earn 7 points. Team 3 earns 500k in all skills except for runecrafting, which they only earned 100k in. They only earn 1 point at the end of bingo for only reaching the "base 100k" mark.
If this tile STILL doesn't make sense, please contact one of the bingo admins or check the bingo faqs channel in the Discord
